quality_gates.rule: Do not publish keyword-variation pages. Every page needs unique data, firsthand proof, screenshots/config, a comparison table, or a strong editorial take.

measurement.primary_metric: GSC impressions and CTR by page/query

candidates.target_query_group: best AI agents for developers; coding agents 2026; AI developer tools
candidates.source_pack: GBrain workflow notes, Claude Code/Codex daily usage, Hermes/OpenClaw/GStack logs
candidates.unique_proof: Firsthand tool matrix with task fit, setup cost, context model, failure modes and current stack screenshots
faq_questions: Which AI agent is best for developers?
When should I use Claude Code instead of Codex?
Do I need MCP servers for coding agents?

candidates.target_query_group: Claude Code vs Codex vs Cursor; Codex alternatives; Claude Code alternatives
candidates.source_pack: Claude Code vs Codex source pack, dual-review workflow, daily migration notes
candidates.unique_proof: Personal migration narrative plus role split table: fast prototyping, deliberate review, IDE autocomplete
faq_questions: Is Codex better than Claude Code?
Should I use Cursor or a terminal coding agent?
Can Claude Code and Codex work together?

candidates.target_query_group: Claude Code MCP servers; MCP for data extraction; browser agent MCP
